Class ProjectileHelper

java.lang.Object
adris.altoclef.util.helpers.ProjectileHelper
public class ProjectileHelper extends Object

  • Method Details

    • hasGravity

      public static boolean hasGravity(net.minecraft.world.entity.projectile.Projectile entity)

    • getFlatDistanceSqr

      public static double getFlatDistanceSqr(double shootX, double shootZ, double velX, double velZ, double playerX, double playerZ)

    • calculateArrowClosestApproach

      public static net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3 calculateArrowClosestApproach(net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3 shootOrigin, net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3 shootVelocity, double yGravity, net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3 playerOrigin)
      Calculates where we think an arrow will "hit" us, or at least where it will be at its closest. Does so by figuring out the closest X-Z coordinate of the arrow's trajectory and then using the height of the arrow when it reaches that point as the result's Y value.

    • calculateArrowClosestApproach

      public static net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3 calculateArrowClosestApproach(CachedProjectile projectile, net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3 pos)

    • calculateAnglesForSimpleProjectileMotion

      public static double[] calculateAnglesForSimpleProjectileMotion(double launchHeight, double launchTargetDistance, double launchVelocity, double gravity)
